description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:16.04 Docker image. Define a single stage called newdatacheck. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get --quiet update --yes, installs git, sets the remote URL to https://gdroidbot:${CI_PUSH_TOKEN}@gitlab.com/gdroid/gdroiddata.git, and configures git user email and name. Add a job named doall that runs in the newdatacheck stage, is excluded from push events (except pushes), and executes the script commands: apt-get --quiet install --yes git python zip unzip virtualenv build-essential python-dev curl; git checkout -B master; ./make_env.sh; ./do_all.sh $MODE; git commit -m "update `date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'`" .; git push --follow-tags origin master. No caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined.
